traceReason: feature/ branches require auditable traces for repository-affecting work
taskSummary: Define compliance scope and system boundary as part of a broader SOC 2 and ISO/IEC 27001 readiness workstream.

bundlesSkipped.reason: No GOV.UK UI, component or interaction behaviour changed.

implementationSummary: Created a SOC 2 and ISO/IEC 27001 readiness documentation folder.
Defined the ResearchOps compliance scope and system boundary across service, data, users, suppliers, integrations and controls.
Added an evidence index that records current evidence and gaps before any compliance claim can be made.
Added a repository test to prevent unsupported compliance or certification wording.

validationEvidence.summary: 4 tests passed for non-claim wording, service boundary content, privacy/supplier essentials and evidence gaps.

validationEvidence.notes: Exited 0 with existing warning-only lint debt.

residualRisks: The proposed boundary requires Home Office owner and security sign-off.
The branch does not create a full asset inventory, risk register, supplier assurance pack, SOC 2 mapping or ISO/IEC 27001 Statement of Applicability.
No SOC 2 compliance or ISO/IEC 27001 certification claim should be made from this PR alone.
